hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qi 'git commit' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qi 'changelog'; then echo 'CHANGELOG REQUIRED: You just made a git commit. Before anything else, invoke /update-changelog to add an entry under [Unreleased] in CHANGELOG.md.'; fi
